Acknowledgement Text: I agree to comply with Flex@TIO policy (as updated from time to time) in accordance with the terms and conditions of my employment.
Acknowledgement Introduction: This policy enables and promotes a culture of flexible working. We are committed to equality, diversity, and inclusion and flexible work practices. The Telecommunications Industry Ombudsman's (TIO) purpose is to provide fair, independent and accessible dispute resolution services and improve outcomes for consumers and members. One of our key goals to achieve our purpose is to leverage the power of our people to strengthen capability and performance. This policy enables our purpose and goals by building adaptable services and shaping a flexible work culture. We welcome the diversity of our workplace participants and recognize the skills, talents, passions, cultures, ethnicities, religions, beliefs, national origins, identities, gender, sex, sexuality, intersex variation, ability, age, life experience and choices and perspectives our workplace participants contribute. TIO is committed to equality, diversity, and inclusion. The TIO is also committed to providing a safe, respectful, and professional workplace in which all are treated with dignity, courtesy, and respect. If you would like to learn more about Flexible Work Arrangements, you can find the Flexible Work Arrangements elearning module available in your PEARL course catalogue or via this link (right click to open in a new window)
